fields.Size: The dimensions of the canvas. At normal scale, this is equivalent to meters
fields.EditModeOnly: This makes this component only editable in Edit Mode
fields.AcceptExistingTouch: If this canvas is already being touched (physically or remotely), accept the input
fields.IgnoreTouchesFromBehind: Makes the canvas ignore all touches from behind
fields.LaserPassThrough: Allows the laser to go through the canvas
fields.PixelScale: Sets the pixel scale for this canvas and its contents
fields.UnitScale: Scales the contents of this canvas, higher number makes the contents smaller
fields._rootRect: Internal - The root rect of this canvas
fields.Collider: The collider that receives touches from this canvas
fields._colliderSize: Internal - Takes in a box collider and uses it for the canvas
fields._colliderOffset: Internal - Offsets this box collider for this canvas
fields.StartingOffset: The visibility order of rendering this canvas (lower number gets drawn over higher numbers)

usage: This component is needed for UIX, without it, your other components that relay on UIX, canvas, elements, and rects will not work as expected. Using a canvas not only organizes your other components, it renders them and makes them usable and interactable.

notes.title: See also
notes.text: * When a child slot is created when under a Slot that has a canvas component, the new child slot will automatically create a RectTransform component.
